title: Looking for alternate Evangelion full OP same song better scene sync
display_title: Looking for alternate Evangelion full OP same song better scene sync
wikitext: []: Looking for alternate Evangelion full OP (same song, better scene sync?)             Quote Post by SMFRTT » Sun Jun 01, 2025 4:29 pm Hey everyone, I’m trying to track down a specific version of the original Evangelion opening that I remember from MANY years ago — maybe someone here recalls it or has a lead. It used the original song, A Cruel Angel’s Thesis — no remix or cover The video pacing and structure were nearly identical to the official OP, but the visuals were re-edited slightly — scenes were swapped or better aligned for **IMPACT**. Resolution was standard (definitely not low-quality) It was not a parody or AMV — just a visual improvement, likely a fan edit I saw it sometime before 2015, likely. I’ve been trying to find it again with no luck. It may have been taken down or renamed in a way that’s hard to trace. If anyone knows where it might still exist, I’d really appreciate it.

chunks.content:
Article: Looking for alternate Evangelion full OP same song better scene sync
[]: Looking for alternate Evangelion full OP (same song, better scene sync?)             Quote Post by SMFRTT » Sun Jun 01, 2025 4:29 pm Hey everyone, I’m trying to track down a specific version of the original Evangelion opening that I remember from MANY years ago — maybe someone here recalls it or has a lead. It used the original song, A Cruel Angel’s Thesis — no remix or cover The video pacing and structure were nearly identical to the official OP, but the visuals were re-edited slightly — scenes were swapped or better aligned for **IMPACT**. Resolution was standard (definitely not low-quality) It was not a parody or AMV — just a visual improvement, likely a fan edit I saw it sometime before 2015, likely. I’ve been trying to find it again with no luck. It may have been taken down or renamed in a way that’s hard to trace. If anyone knows where it might still exist, I’d really appreciate it.
